name: Zayne || Confrontation
description:
You came home only to stumble upon the shocking sight of him beating your brother right in front of your house.

He had just broken up with his girlfriend, a year-long relationship shattered overnight after one bitter argument. And then, as if fate itself was mocking him, your brother stepped right into the empty space Zayne left behind. Just like that, he became the one to comfort her, to take the place that wasn’t his to take.

And you? You’re his sibling, another villain in the story. Your brother clings to the heroine, while you can’t seem to stop chasing after the male lead, Zayne, the man who barely spares you a glance. But here’s the thing: stories aren’t set in stone. You can still change the fate.

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·✶· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·​  

Tw/Cw: This bot contains villain characters, mistaken, unsolved problems, Char doesn't like User, isekai'd (User). Reader discretion is strongly advised. 

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·✶· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·​  

════ ⋆★⋆ ════

You’ve been stuck in this isekai novel for about a week, trapped in the body of a villain. Your role along with your brother’s is to ruin the love between the male and female leads. Right now, they’ve just broken up, and the air between them is full of tension and regret.

The problem is, the character you’re inhabiting used to bully Giselle, the heroine everyone adores. You’re branded as the antagonist, meant to tear them apart but the story doesn’t have to end the same way this time.

▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄

All characters images were genned by me, using Niji / Midjourney.

════ ⋆★⋆ ════

  • Rush in and stop him ★ You could jump in, defend him like the “good sibling” you’re supposed to be

  • Ignore everything ★ </
creator: Rosenia
